title: cyphocarpus innocuus
intro: Cyphocarpus innocuus, also known as the innocent snakeroot, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to North America. Traditionally, Cyphocarpus innocuus has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and its extracts have been used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Cyphocarpus innocuus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves are often dried and used in folk medicine.
